variables.name: container_image
variables.description: Container image for workspaces. The image determines which tools and languages are available in the workspace by default. See the template README for guidance on choosing an image.

variables.name: use_kubeconfig
variables.description: Use host kubeconfig. Set to true if the Coder host is running outside the Kubernetes cluster for workspaces.

variables.name: namespace
variables.description: The Kubernetes namespace to create workspaces in. Must exist prior to creating workspaces.
